attacking_style: Launches late attacks from breakaways on rolling terrain, typically with 2km to go. Prefers solo efforts from reduced groups rather than attacking the peloton directly.
team_tactics: Operates with freedom in breakaways without GC protection duties. Limited evidence of team setup for attacks; appears to ride opportunistically when given leeway.
terrain_preference: Rolling terrain suits best for late breakaway accelerations. Exposed on steep, punchy finishes where pure climbers drop him in final meters.
vulnerability: Struggles to hold wheels of pure climbers on steep gradients in final 100-200 meters. Bridge attempts from peloton to breakaways lack coordination and success.
key_patterns: Attacks from breakaways in final 2km rather than initiating breaks from peloton (2 instances)
Operates in aggressive, opportunistic role without GC responsibilities across races (3 instances)
Lost contact with stronger climbers on steep finishes in closing meters (2 instances)
Bridge attempts to breakaways unsuccessful, caught by peloton or coordinated poorly (2 instances)
form_trajectory: neutral: 2018 showed recovery ability post-injury with solo win, but 2021 Giro attempt lacked punch. Limited recent data for conclusive trend.
